commands.review_summary:
The PR adds an opt-in CaMeL-style prompt-injection defense with taint/provenance tracking, agent runner orchestration, before-tool-call enforcement, gateway approval plumbing, config schema, SECURITY.md docs, and tests.

Reproducibility: yes. Source inspection of the PR head gives high-confidence reproduction paths for the review findings: intermediate results can lose taint, defaults-only config can skip the hook guard, and post-orchestration synthesis can use the normal tool-enabled session.
